_doc: Patterns for 'trigger N RPC' / 'fire M HTTP calls' style recipe phrases. Project-agnostic — emits generic fetch() loops; specific endpoint targeting added by stack-specific patterns.

patterns.template:
# Trigger a longpolling request — recipe says this must be tagged ASYNC.
        page.evaluate('''async () => fetch('/longpolling/poll', {{
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {{'Content-Type': 'application/json'}},
            credentials: 'same-origin',
            body: JSON.stringify({{jsonrpc:'2.0', params: {{channels: ['test'], last: 0}}}})
        }}).catch(()=>{{}})''')
